children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Register a new patient in the system
children.behavior: Extract patient details from input, validate uniqueness, and store in patients data store
postconditions: patient record created in patients data store

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient details including name, age, contact, medical_history

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, patient_id, and message

constraints.description: patient_id must be unique across all patients
patient_data must contain all required fields: name, age, contact

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid patient_data, when RegisterPatient is called, then a new patient record is created and a unique patient_id is returned
Given duplicate patient data, when RegisterPatient is called, then an error is returned and no duplicate record is created

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Book an appointment for a registered patient
children.behavior: Validate patient exists, check appointment slot availability, and store appointment in appointments data store
postconditions: appointment record created in appointments data store

inputs.name: appointment_data
inputs.description: Appointment details including patient_id, doctor, date, time

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, appointment_id, and message

constraints.description: appointment slot must not be already booked for the same doctor, date, and time
patient_id must reference an existing patient

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid appointment_data for an existing patient and available slot, when BookAppointment is called, then an appointment record is created and a unique appointment_id is returned
Given a non-existent patient_id, when BookAppointment is called, then an error is returned
Given a slot that is already booked, when BookAppointment is called, then an error is returned

children.name: GetRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve medical records for a registered patient
children.behavior: Validate patient exists, fetch records from patients data store (append-only), and return them

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, records list, and message

constraints.description: patient_id must reference an existing patient

acceptance_criteria.description: Given an existing patient_id, when GetRecords is called, then the patient's medical records are returned
Given a non-existent patient_id, when GetRecords is called, then an error is returned

children.name: UpdateProfile
children.purpose: Update profile information for a registered patient
children.behavior: Validate patient exists, update patient profile fields in patients data store
postconditions: patient profile updated in patients data store

inputs.name: update_data
inputs.description: JSON with patient_id and fields to update (e.g., contact, address)

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, updated profile, and message

global_vars.description: read existing profile and write updated fields

constraints.description: patient_id must reference an existing patient
only allowed fields (contact, address, phone) can be updated

acceptance_criteria.description: Given an existing patient_id and valid update fields, when UpdateProfile is called, then the patient profile is updated and the updated profile is returned
Given a non-existent patient_id, when UpdateProfile is called, then an error is returned
Given invalid update fields, when UpdateProfile is called, then an error is returned and no changes are made

governance_notes: All children operate on the same data stores (patients, appointments) with appropriate read/write permissions. RegisterPatient and BookAppointment require write access to their respective stores. GetRecords requires read-only access. UpdateProfile requires read-write access. Each child validates preconditions before performing operations. The parent orchestrates routing based on the command field in the input.
